issues.sample: THE FUEL GAUGE IS NOT WORKING, THE CAR IS READING AS FULL THE WHOLE TIME. AS MY WIFE AND I SHARE THE CAR, WE ALWAYS ASSUME THE OTHER WAS RE-FILLING IT, UNTIL IT DIED ON HER. WORST IS THAT, THEY WILL NOT KEEP IT FOR REPAIR AS THEY DON'T HAVE THE PARTS. THEY SEND YOU WITH THIS SAFE

narrative.headline: What 2018 Acura Ilx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 23 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (52% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
